jsonLd.title: Croma is Hiring: Floor Manager (Principal)
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Floor Manager with drive and ambition, Croma in Vijayawada is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Croma:
Croma is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Prepare daily sales reports and share insights with management
• Ensure visual merchandising standards are maintained at all times
• Build relationships with regular customers to drive loyalty
• Assist in recruiting, onboarding, and performance management of staff
• Coordinate with the supply chain team for timely stock delivery
• Manage shrinkage and reduce stock discrepancies
• Ensure compliance with company policies and retail regulations

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in SAP Retail
• Proficiency in Retail Analytics
• Proficiency in Planogram
• Proficiency in Retail Operations
• Proficiency in Team Leadership
• Proficiency in Loss Prevention
• Proficiency in Shrinkage Control

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Life and accident insurance
• Professional development and training programs
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Referral bonus program
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Vijayawada, Andhra Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Croma!
